readings.Aries: There's more room in this situation than your first read suggested. Take a second look. Small, deliberate, and patient — that's the mode today.
readings.Taurus: The dependable version of yourself is real. The rest of you is also real and occasionally needs air. Something small done consistently has more effect than something large done once.
readings.Gemini: The distraction is real and deliberate. You know what you're distracting yourself from. The energy available today is better used gently.
readings.Cancer: Your relationship to security is being tested in a low-key way that you've already noticed. Someone you haven't thought of lately is relevant to this.
readings.Leo: You see yourself most clearly through the eyes of people who love you. Choose those mirrors. Simpler is correct here.
readings.Virgo: There is order inside the disorder. You will find it. Give yourself the time. Go back to the original intention — it's still the right one.
readings.Libra: Someone has been telling you what you want to hear. You already know this. The question matters more than the answer right now.
readings.Scorpio: You process everything through transformation. Even rest, in you, becomes power. The answer that feels too obvious is probably the actual answer.
readings.Sagittarius: The person who challenged you was right. You don't have to tell them. Incorporate the data. Let this one be easy.
readings.Capricorn: The patience you've shown is remarkable. It is not infinite. Know when you're close to the edge. The timing is better than it feels.
readings.Aquarius: The revolution you believe in is needed. The cost of it, for the people around you, is worth acknowledging. This situation responds well to direct engagement.
readings.Pisces: Something is converging — threads you've been holding separately are about to become the same thread. Simpler is correct here.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: You recognised each other immediately. Whether that's good news depends entirely on what you recognised.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: Neither of you knows how to be small around the other. Decide if that's exhilarating or just exhausting.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: You both arrived wanting to lead. The negotiation of who does is where most of the energy goes.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: The security you build together is real. Real security sometimes disguises the need for something more.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: You recognise each other's methods. Whether that familiarity breeds trust or contempt is up to you.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: You make each other sharper. You also make each other better at avoiding the things words can't fix.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: You accelerate each other. The direction you're heading is worth establishing before you reach full speed.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: There's real joy between you when you're moving. The stillness is harder for both of you, and necessary.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: The conversation never stops. Decide if what you're talking around is more interesting than what you'd find if you arrived.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: The emotional fluency here is extraordinary. The risk is drowning in it before finding solid ground.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: You absorb each other's moods completely. Make sure the current is flowing in a direction you chose.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: The emotional fluency here is extraordinary. The risk is drowning in it before finding solid ground.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: You give each other permission to be more yourselves. Sometimes that permission is exactly the problem.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: Reliability offered freely in both directions. What neither of you is good at is saying what you actually want.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: Reliability offered freely in both directions. What neither of you is good at is saying what you actually want.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: Your different relationships with time are either the most useful thing about this or the most exhausting.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: Something about this combination feels irresistible to both of you. That irresistibility is worth examining.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: You understand each other at a speed that feels like recognition. Familiarity this fast always hides something.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: You feel each other before you know each other. Whether that's intimacy or projection is worth examining.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: The bond forms quietly and completely. What you've bonded over — desire, or need — is worth knowing.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: The competition is never stated and never absent. You perform for each other even when you don't mean to.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: The heat and the depth exist in real tension. That tension is the most honest thing between you.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: You recognise each other's methods. Whether that familiarity breeds trust or contempt is up to you.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: Your different relationships with time are either the most useful thing about this or the most exhausting.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: The emotional fluency here is extraordinary. The risk is drowning in it before finding solid ground.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
